title: eulophia gastrodioides
intro: Eulophia gastrodioides, also known as the tiger orchid or leopard orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is a type of medicinal herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, or made into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
